widget.title: Oak catch list — before the Kanto badges (203/204 cumulative)

rows.label: (Virtual Console only) CELEBI L30
rows.note: GS Ball from the Goldenrod PC comms floor → Kurt overnight → Ilex shrine; Recover-stall it like a beast

rows.label: Electabuzz → breed for Elekid
rows.note: Route 10 grass near the Power Plant

rows.label: Kangaskhan
rows.note: Rock Tunnel lower floors

rows.label: Houndour → Houndoom (L24)
rows.note: Route 7, night only

rows.label: Murkrow
rows.note: Route 7, night only

rows.label: Grimer → Muk (L38)
rows.note: Celadon City pool (Surf) — 10% for wild Muk

rows.label: Porygon
rows.note: Celadon Game Corner, 5,555 coins — Porygon2 is a trade evo, unobtainable

rows.label: LARVITAR → Pupitar (L30) → Tyranitar (L55)
rows.note: Celadon Game Corner, 8,888 coins — arrives L40, only 15 levels to Tyranitar; normally a 16-badge catch

rows.label: Slugma → Magcargo (L38)
rows.note: Routes 16/17/18, daytime

rows.label: Chansey → Blissey (happiness)
rows.note: Route 15 — 1% at L25: lead an L24 mon with a Repel; breed for the trade Chansey

rows.label: Aerodactyl (trade a Chansey)
rows.note: Route 14 — trade the BRED Chansey, not your only one

rows.label: SNORLAX L50
rows.note: Radio Channel 20.0 at Diglett's Cave — save first; catch, don't KO

rows.label: Diglett → Dugtrio (L26)
rows.note: Diglett's Cave — wild Dugtrio also appears

rows.label: Pikachu → Raichu (Thunder Stone) → breed for Pichu
rows.note: Route 2 grass

rows.label: Clefairy → Clefable (Moon Stone) → breed for Cleffa
rows.note: Mt. Moon — Monday-night dance leaves a Moon Stone (bring Rock Smash!); 2% hold a Moon Stone (Thief)

rows.label: Mr. Mime
rows.note: Route 21 grass (Surf from Pallet), morning/day

rows.label: Elekid, Pichu, Cleffa (breeding round)
rows.note: Johto Day-Care with Ditto

rows.label: Rainbow Wing — prove the three beasts to Eusine
rows.note: Oak guide: Eusine at the Celadon Game Corner area; Bulbapedia: the middle Tin Tower sage — verify which (or both) in-game

rows.label: LUGIA L60
rows.note: Whirl Islands B2F inner chamber (Silver Wing from Pewter) — Heavy Balls excel

rows.label: HO-OH L60
rows.note: Tin Tower roof (Rainbow Wing) — the Oak guide spends the Master Ball on one of the two box birds
